texto: One is not required to like a movie in order to learn from it. Our personal views provide a legitimate perspective, as long as we recognize and acknowledge how they may color our interpretation.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richard Barsam: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “One is not required to like a movie in order to learn from it. Our personal views provide a legit…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, diversity, open-mindedness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de open-mindedness.
